title: Merger and consolidation
doc_html:
§912.  Merger and consolidation

Professional medical corporations may be merged into or consolidated only with other professional medical corporations.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 27, §1.

§912.  Merger and consolidation
Professional medical corporations may be merged into or consolidated only with other professional medical corporations.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 27, §1.
